'''âng-k-th''' ('''kangakath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vagabond|vagabond]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vagabond|vagabond]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-k-th
|-
! Lemma
| kangakath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingakath|thingakath]] || [[word:jingakath|jingakath]] || [[word:shingakath|shingakath]] || [[word:kingakath|kingakath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungakath|thuthungakath]] || [[word:jujungakath|jujungakath]] || [[word:shushungakath|shushungakath]] || [[word:kukungakath|kukungakath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungakath|thungakath]] || [[word:jungakath|jungakath]] || [[word:shungakath|shungakath]] || [[word:kungakath|kungakath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungakath|thungakath]] || [[word:jungakath|jungakath]] || [[word:shungakath|shungakath]] || [[word:kungakath|kungakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengakath|thengakath]] || [[word:jengakath|jengakath]] || [[word:shengakath|shengakath]] || [[word:kengakath|kengakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongakath|thothongakath]] || [[word:jojongakath|jojongakath]] || [[word:shoshongakath|shoshongakath]] || [[word:kokongakath|kokongakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongakath|thongakath]] || [[word:jongakath|jongakath]] || [[word:shongakath|shongakath]] || [[word:kongakath|kongakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongakath|thongakath]] || [[word:jongakath|jongakath]] || [[word:shongakath|shongakath]] || [[word:kongakath|kongakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngakath|thĂŠngakath]] || [[word:jĂŠngakath|jĂŠngakath]] || [[word:shĂŠngakath|shĂŠngakath]] || [[word:kĂŠngakath|kĂŠngakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangakath|thathangakath]] || [[word:jajangakath|jajangakath]] || [[word:shashangakath|shashangakath]] || [[word:kakangakath|kakangakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangakath|thangakath]] || [[word:jangakath|jangakath]] || [[word:shangakath|shangakath]] || [[word:kangakath|kangakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangakath|thangakath]] || [[word:jangakath|jangakath]] || [[word:shangakath|shangakath]] || [[word:kangakath|kangakath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangakath|shangakath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangakath|goshangakath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangakath|gokishangakath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangakathnĂŒ|shangakathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangakathnknĂŒ|goshangakathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangakathnĂŒ|gokishangakathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangakathshĂ«|shangakathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangakathnkshĂ«|goshangakathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangakathshĂ«|gokishangakathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangakathro|shangakathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangakathnkro|goshangakathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangakathro|gokishangakathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangakathmu|shangakathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangakathnkmu|goshangakathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangakathmu|gokishangakathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangakathsher|shangakathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangakathnksher|goshangakathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangakathsher|gokishangakathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangakathng|shangakathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangakathnkng|goshangakathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangakathng|gokishangakathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangakathya|shangakathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangakathnkya|goshangakathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangakathya|gokishangakathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangakathyam|shangakathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangakathnkyam|goshangakathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangakathyam|gokishangakathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangakathnĂŒshĂ«|shangakathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangakathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangakathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangakathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangakathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangakathnĂŒro|shangakathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangakathnknĂŒro|goshangakathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangakathnĂŒro|gokishangakathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangakathnĂŒmu|shangakathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangakathnknĂŒmu|goshangakathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangakathnĂŒmu|gokishangakathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangakathshĂ«nĂŒ|shangakathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangakathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangakathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangakathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangakathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangakathshĂ«ro|shangakathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangakathnkshĂ«ro|goshangakathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangakathshĂ«ro|gokishangakathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangakathshĂ«mu|shangakathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangakathnkshĂ«mu|goshangakathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangakathshĂ«mu|gokishangakathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangakathronĂŒ|shangakathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangakathnkronĂŒ|goshangakathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangakathronĂŒ|gokishangakathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangakathroshĂ«|shangakathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangakathnkroshĂ«|goshangakathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangakathroshĂ«|gokishangakathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangakathromu|shangakathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangakathnkromu|goshangakathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangakathromu|gokishangakathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangakathmunĂŒ|shangakathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangakathnkmunĂŒ|goshangakathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangakathmunĂŒ|gokishangakathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangakathmushĂ«|shangakathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangakathnkmushĂ«|goshangakathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangakathmushĂ«|gokishangakathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangakathmuro|shangakathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangakathnkmuro|goshangakathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangakathmuro|gokishangakathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
